case_title: DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES VS GREEN GEORGE

docket_entries.description: CASE WILL BE HEARD IN DEPT 19, HALL OF JUSTICE 850 BRYANT ST. S.F. TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE LITTLE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-09-1992, GRANTED
FOLDER SENT TO A. ANDAYA DEPT. 19, HALL OF JUSTICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN GEORGE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-10-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-03-1992 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN GEORGE $3,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $16.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,266.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GREEN GEORGE HEARING SET FOR APR-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN GEORGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
